Notes: Firebase budget alerts are managed in Google Cloud Billing budgets.
Use account-level billing notifications and per-project environment variables/secrets.
Also configure alerts in dashboard notifications.
Configure usage thresholds to avoid overages.
Set sending limits per environment where possible.
Track request and storage usage by database.
Confirm spend caps and workspace limits.
Costs vary by each subscribed API plan.
Measurement IDs are public identifiers not secrets.
